description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.6 Docker image and a docker:dind service, with two stages: check and build_image. In the check stage add a check job that runs pip install -U pre-commit pytest and pip install . in a before_script, then executes pre-commit run -a and python setup.py test. In the build_image stage add a build_image job that uses the docker:git image, runs only on the master branch, logs in to registry.gitlab.com with the CI build token, builds the image registry.gitlab.com/stavros/caduceus and pushes the latest tag. No caches, artifacts, or deployments are defined.
